It has three levels of speed and can be comfortably held in your hand for a long time. I just got this, so I am not sure how long the battery will last. I would not hesitate to buy it. reviews.title: Perfect For On The Go!

The body itself is reasonable ergonomic making it gently on the hand when working out sore muscles and light enough that doesn’t fatigue your arms/hands after a short session. reviews.author: Royer

reviews.title: Great for Travel!
reviews.text:
This is the perfect travel substitute for any of the larger Theragun models. It fits easily into your suitcase, and it comes with attachments of its own but also is compatible with any of the attachments that Theragun sells. The battery life is great and USB-C charging means not having to carry a separate charger, also a plus.
The only complaint I have is that at this price point, Theragun could have included a hard-sided carrying case, capable of carrying the unit *and* its attachments. I had to purchase one (a binocular case) separately. It works well but like I said, Thergun could have included a case and saved my the hassle (for reference, the Ekrin Bantam includes a case).
That aside, it's a great travel companion, and you won't be sad at all if you decide to purchase one!
reviews.author: WJF54

reviews.title: Therabody Theragun Mini Review
reviews.text:
The Theragun Mini is an excellent portable muscle massager. Its compact design and quiet operation make it ideal for on-the-go use. Despite its size, it delivers powerful percussive therapy with three adjustable speed settings. The battery life is impressive, lasting up to 150 minutes on a single charge. The ergonomic handle ensures comfortable use, and the USB-C charging port is convenient. While it lacks additional attachments, the standard ball works well for most muscles. 

Overall, it’s a great choice for effective, portable muscle relief.

reviews.title: Excellent value

Plus, the nature of it being easier to use with one hand allows you to get your shoulders and other sore areas after long drives. I would wholeheartedly recommend this massager to anyone I know. I use it after work many days and its convenience really encourages often use, Plus, it was a big hit at my last family get together.

reviews.title: Massage Therapy
reviews.text: The Thermabody Mini Thermagun has truly become my saving grace. I have incorporated it into my nightly routine, using it 3-4 times a week while in bed unwinding. Not only does it provide relief for my muscle aches, but it also enhances their recovery. This device is truly remarkable in its effectiveness and ease of use; it can effortlessly be operated with just one hand. I highly recommend the Thermabody Mini Thermagun for anyone looking to alleviate muscle tension and promote overall well-being.
